markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To provide training and guidance on backlink strategies and processes for growthx.ai's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Backlinks are a crucial part of content distribution and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses vendors Loganix and Brainy Beast for acquiring backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Managing Editors should oversee backlink strategy, balancing homepage, service pages, and pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [The company aims to expand into more content distribution methods beyond just backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)

## Topics

### Characteristics of Good Backlinks

  - [High domain authority score](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Reputable, non-sketchy sources](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Relevant anchor text and placement](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Natural link profile (not spammy)](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Ideally from sites that don't sell links (e.g. major publications)](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Generate actual referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Backlink Acquisition Process

  - [Using Loganix platform to select and purchase backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Providing URLs and anchor text to Brainy Beast for manual outreach](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Aiming for an average cost of $250 per link, balancing budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Targeting a mix of homepage, service pages, and key content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Considering factors like domain rating, traffic, and relevance when selecting](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Backlink Strategy Considerations

  - [Balancing different types of backlinks for a natural profile](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Focusing on niche-relevant sites when possible](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Promoting both homepage and specific content/service pages](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Aligning backlink strategy with overall content goals and performance](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [Potential to develop an internal backlink exchange network among clients](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Expanding Content Distribution

  - [Backlinks are a priority but other distribution methods discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
      - [Email marketing](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
      - [Social media content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
      - [Creating bonus content for clients (e.g. playlists, meditations)](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
  - [Aim to position growthx.ai as more than just a content production service](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Managing Editors (Jess, Jürgen) to oversee backlink strategy](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [Senior Content Managers (e.g. Becerra, Matt) could potentially assist](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [Branko to lead development of backlink processes/offerings](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Content Managers to focus on individual content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jess and Jürgen to begin taking over backlink management in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Explore potential for developing internal backlink exchange network among clients](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Consider creating more formalized training/documentation on backlink processes](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Evaluate opportunities to expand content distribution efforts beyond backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
  - [Discuss further team role delineation regarding strategy vs. execution tasks](https://fathom.video/share/V6tpJ8xCcSsE1qQsHzKXrGHub8ZazVs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
